name: plusarg_reader.v

regFields.name: debug_hart_halted
regFields.desc: Debug ROM Causes hart to write its hartID here when it is in Debug Mode.

regFields.name: debug_hart_going
regFields.desc: Debug ROM causes hart to write 0 here when it begins executing Debug Mode instructions.

regFields.name: debug_hart_resuming
regFields.desc: Debug ROM causes hart to write its hartID here when it leaves Debug Mode.

regFields.name: debug_hart_exception
regFields.desc: Debug ROM causes hart to write 0 here if it gets an exception in Debug Mode.

regFields.name: debug_data_0
regFields.groupDesc: Data used to communicate with Debug Module

regFields.name: debug_progbuf_0
regFields.groupDesc: Program buffer used to communicate with Debug Module

regFields.name: debug_whereto
regFields.desc: Instruction filled in by Debug Module to control hart in Debug Mode

regFields.name: debug_flags_0
regFields.groupDesc: Memory region used to control hart going/resuming in Debug Mode

regFields.name: pending_1
regFields.desc: Set to 1 if interrupt source 1 is pending, regardless of its enable or priority setting.
regFields.groupDesc: Pending Bit Array. 1 Bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: pending_2
regFields.desc: Set to 1 if interrupt source 2 is pending, regardless of its enable or priority setting.
regFields.groupDesc: Pending Bit Array. 1 Bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.groupDesc: Pending Bit Array. 1 Bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.desc: Set to 1 if interrupt source 4 is pending, regardless of its enable or priority setting.
regFields.groupDesc: Pending Bit Array. 1 Bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: pending_5
regFields.desc: Set to 1 if interrupt source 5 is pending, regardless of its enable or priority setting.
regFields.groupDesc: Pending Bit Array. 1 Bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: pending_6
regFields.desc: Set to 1 if interrupt source 6 is pending, regardless of its enable or priority setting.
regFields.groupDesc: Pending Bit Array. 1 Bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: pending_7
regFields.desc: Set to 1 if interrupt source 7 is pending, regardless of its enable or priority setting.
regFields.groupDesc: Pending Bit Array. 1 Bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: pending_8
regFields.desc: Set to 1 if interrupt source 8 is pending, regardless of its enable or priority setting.
regFields.groupDesc: Pending Bit Array. 1 Bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: pending_9
regFields.desc: Set to 1 if interrupt source 9 is pending, regardless of its enable or priority setting.
regFields.groupDesc: Pending Bit Array. 1 Bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: pending_10
regFields.desc: Set to 1 if interrupt source 10 is pending, regardless of its enable or priority setting.
regFields.groupDesc: Pending Bit Array. 1 Bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: pending_11
regFields.desc: Set to 1 if interrupt source 11 is pending, regardless of its enable or priority setting.
regFields.groupDesc: Pending Bit Array. 1 Bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: enables_0
regFields.desc: Targets 1-7. Set bits to 1 if interrupt should be enabled.
regFields.groupDesc: Enable bits for each interrupt source for target 0. 1 bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: enables_1
regFields.desc: Targets 8-11. Set bits to 1 if interrupt should be enabled.
regFields.groupDesc: Enable bits for each interrupt source for target 0. 1 bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: enables_0
regFields.desc: Targets 1-7. Set bits to 1 if interrupt should be enabled.
regFields.groupDesc: Enable bits for each interrupt source for target 1. 1 bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: enables_1
regFields.desc: Targets 8-11. Set bits to 1 if interrupt should be enabled.
regFields.groupDesc: Enable bits for each interrupt source for target 1. 1 bit for each interrupt source.

regFields.name: threshold_0
regFields.desc: Interrupt & claim threshold for target 0. Maximum value is 7.

regFields.name: claim_complete_0
regFields.desc: Claim/Complete register for Target 0. Reading this register returns the claimed interrupt number and makes it no longer pending.Writing the interrupt number back completes the interrupt.

regFields.name: threshold_1
regFields.desc: Interrupt & claim threshold for target 1. Maximum value is 7.

regFields.name: claim_complete_1
regFields.desc: Claim/Complete register for Target 1. Reading this register returns the claimed interrupt number and makes it no longer pending.Writing the interrupt number back completes the interrupt.
